case_title: WAYNE CHUNG MD VS. MEDICAL BOARD OF CALIFORNIA
cause_of_action: WRITS OF MANDATE OR PROH., CERTI., ETC./ADMIN. AGEN

docket_entries.description: ORDER RETURNING ADMINISTRATIVE RECORD TO PETITIONER
ANSWER TO PETITION FOR WRIT OF MANDATE/ PROHIBITION/ CERTIFICATION FILED BY RESPONDENT MEDICAL BOARD OF CALIFORNIA

LAW AND MOTION 302, PETITIONER WAYNE CHUNG, M.D.'S PETITION FOR WRIT OF ADMINISTRATIVE MANDAMUS [CODE OF CIV. PROC. SECTION 1094.5; GOV'T CODE SECTION 11523]. RULING: ARGUED AND THE COURT RULED AS FOLLOWS: PARTIES TO SUBMIT SUPPLEMENTAL BRIEFS ADDRESSING CASES WHERE A REMAND LIMITED TO DIRECTING RESPONDENT TO RECONSIDER TERMS OF PROBATION. PARTIES TO FILE BY 11/24/08, AT WHICH TIME THE COURT WILL TAKE THE MATTER UNDER SUBMISSION AND WILL ISSUE A MINUTE ORDER THEREAFTER. (302/PJM) JUDGE: PATRICK J. MAHONEY, REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR 8600

LAW AND MOTION, 302, NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: PETITIONER WAYNE CHUNG'S PETITION FOR WRIT OF ADMINISTRATIVE MANDAMUS IS DEEMED SUBMITTED. (302/PJM) JUDGE: PATRICK J. MAHONEY, REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR 8600. PETITIONER WAYNE CHUNG'S NOTICE OF PETITION FOR WRIT OF ADMINISTRATIVE MANDAMUS, SUBMITTED ON NOV-24-2008 BY PATRICK J. MAHONEY.
SUPPLEMENTAL BRIEF RE: PETITION FOR ADMINISTRATIVE WRIT OF MANDAMUS FILED BY PETITIONER CHUNG MD, WAYNE

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PETITIONER CHUNG MD, WAYNE TAKE NOTHING FROM RESPONDENT MEDICAL BOARD OF CALIFORNIA ON PETITION FOR WRIT OF ADMINISTRATIVE MANDAMUS (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT)

Off Calendar Dec-19-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: PETITIONER WAYNE CHUNG'S PETITION FOR WRIT OF ADMINISTRATIVE MANDAMUS is deemed submitted. (302/PJM/JW) Judge: Patrick J. Mahoney, Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR 8600

Petitioner Wayne Chung'S Notice Of Petition For Writ Of Administrative Mandamus
Off Calendar Nov-13-2008 Continued To Nov-24-08 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: PETITIONER WAYNE CHUNG, M.D.'S Petition For Writ Of Administrative Mandamus [Code of Civ. Proc. Section 1094.5; Gov't Code Section 11523].
APPEARANCES: John L. Fleer, Esq. 925/930-9518 for petitioner & moving party; Larry Mercer, Deputy Atty General 703-5539 for respondent & opposing party.
RULING: Argued and the Court ruled as follows: Parties to submit supplemental briefs addressing cases where a remand limited to directing respondent to reconsider terms of probation. Parties to file by 11/24/08, at which time the Court will take the matter under submission and will issue a minute order thereafter. (302/PJM/JW) Judge: Patrick J. Mahoney, Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR 8600
